milestone: AGH v1 Patch 4 — validation → governance bridge closure (deterministic challenger artifact id + metric-based gate + automated RegistryUpdateProposalV1 emission; operator-gated apply preserved)
scope: Build the deterministic upstream path from completed factor_validation evidence to governed promotion proposals. The new layer4_promotion_evaluator_v1 module (a) deterministically derives an artifact_id from (factor, universe, horizon_type, return_basis, validation_run_id), (b) builds a ModelArtifactPacketV0-compatible challenger artifact via metis_brain.artifact_from_validation_v1, (c) builds a PromotionGateRecordV0 via metis_brain.validation_bridge_v0 + factor_validation_gate_adapter_v0, (d) decides a verdict ∈ (promote, hold, reject) with explicit blocking_reasons, (e) when verdict=promote and the artifact is not already active, mutates the brain bundle ONLY through validate_merged_bundle_dict + write_bundle_json_atomic (canonical path) to register the challenger slot + gate record, (f) emits a RegistryUpdateProposalV1(target='registry_entry_artifact_promotion') + governance_queue job, and (g) always emits a ValidationPromotionEvaluationV1 audit packet so replay can reconstruct the upstream chain whether or not a proposal was generated. apply still requires harness-decide approve + the Patch 3 registry_patch_executor.

user_decisions.q_artifact_id_policy: B — Deterministic hash: artifact_id = art_<factor>_<universe>_<horizon_type>_<return_basis>_<hex8(sha256(pipe-joined+validation_run_id))>. Running the evaluator twice on the same validation_run_id yields identical artifact identity; different basis/universe slots deterministically diverge. The evaluator also gains authority to extend bundle.artifacts[] + registry_entry.challenger_artifact_ids[] via the canonical validate + atomic write path when a new challenger slot is needed.
user_decisions.q_emitter_surface: Y — CLI + library API + new tick kind: expose (1) a pure function evaluate_validation_for_promotion / evaluate_registry_entries, (2) a harness-evaluate-promotions CLI subcommand with --dry-run and --spec-file, and (3) a new governance_scan cadence (default 15m) that walks an operator-supplied spec provider. Apply remains operator-gated in all three surfaces.

ValidationPromotionEvaluationV1.purpose: Audit packet emitted by layer4_promotion_evaluator_v1 for every completed factor_validation run inspected for potential artifact promotion. Pairs with an automatically emitted RegistryUpdateProposalV1 when the gate verdict is 'promote' and the derived artifact is not already active; otherwise records an honest blocked outcome with explicit blocking_reasons.
payload_keys: gate_metrics (dict: pit_pass / coverage_pass / monotonicity_pass / sample_count / valid_factor_count / spearman_abs / gate_reasons)
coherence_rules: outcome='proposal_emitted' ⇒ gate_verdict='promote' and emitted_proposal_packet_id non-empty and artifact_action ≠ 'already_active'
any non-emitted outcome ⇒ emitted_proposal_packet_id is None / empty
no raw 'active_registry_mutation' field permitted (bundle writes go through the evaluator's canonical validate + atomic write path)

RegistryUpdateProposalV1 (auto-emitted).payload.from_challenger_artifact_ids: current challenger list AFTER the evaluator's bundle mutation (new challenger slot already present)
RegistryUpdateProposalV1 (auto-emitted).payload.to_challenger_artifact_ids: post-swap challenger list (the old active rotates into challengers; the new active leaves the challenger slot)
RegistryUpdateProposalV1 (auto-emitted).operator_gate: Apply still requires harness-decide approve; the evaluator never mutates active_artifact_id.

added_challenger (verdict=promote, artif: append candidate ModelArtifactPacketV0 dict to bundle.artifacts[]
merge PromotionGateRecordV0 into bundle.promotion_gates[] so integrity sees a matching gate for the challenger
already_active (active artifact matches: validation_pointer refresh on the active artifact only
gate record replaced for the active artifact_id; active_artifact_id NEVER changes
BrainBundleV0 evaluator-side writes.write_path: validate_merged_bundle_dict → write_bundle_json_atomic (same canonical chain Patch 2 + Patch 3 use)

cadence.name: layer4.governance_scan
cadence.behavior: Calls the operator-installed spec provider (set_governance_scan_spec_provider). If no provider is configured → honest skip (reason='no_governance_scan_spec_provider'). Otherwise walks each spec, reloading the bundle between specs so cross-spec challenger additions compose deterministically. Returns a summary {scans, by_outcome, emitted_proposal_packet_ids}.

modes: Spec file: --spec-file path.json (list of dicts, evaluated in order with fresh bundle reloads)
flags: --dry-run (runs the full pipeline without persisting packets or mutating the bundle; stdout-only preview)
--use-fixture (route via FixtureHarnessStore for offline runbook runs)
cli.output: JSON blob on stdout with {ok, dry_run, result | results}.

new_fields: chain[i].validation_promotion_evaluation (the evaluator audit packet that emitted the chain's proposal, or None)
validation_promotion_evaluations (flat list of every matched evaluation, including blocked outcomes that never emitted a proposal, newest-first)
replay_lineage_api.backcompat: Patch 2 horizon_provenance proposals and Patch 3 artifact_promotion chains still surface exactly as before.

layer5_orchestrator_updates.system_prompt_vocab: Adds ValidationPromotionEvaluationV1 + outcome vocabulary (proposal_emitted / blocked_by_gate / blocked_missing_evidence / blocked_same_as_active / blocked_bundle_integrity) + blocking_reasons examples (pit_failed, coverage_insufficient, monotonicity_inconclusive). The LLM must never claim the Today registry has changed based on an evaluation alone; a proposal_emitted outcome is still gated by harness-decide + registry_patch_executor + SpectrumRefreshRecordV1.outcome='applied'.

effect: No schema change beyond the CHECK constraint — canonical write continues in the brain bundle JSON.
non_goals_sql: factor_validation_* tables remain the source of truth; evaluator reads via db.records helpers when a Supabase client is available.

new_tests.test_layer4_promotion_evaluator_v1.py: 9 tests — derive_artifact_id determinism + distinctness per tuple + input validation. promote happy path (added_challenger + proposal + evaluation + governance_queue job). blocked_by_gate (pit_certified=False → verdict=reject; bundle unchanged; blocking_reasons include pit_failed). blocked_missing_evidence (no summary; bundle unchanged; evaluation still emitted). blocked_same_as_active (derived id == active → artifact_action=already_active, active state untouched, validation_pointer refreshed). horizon mismatch (requested bundle horizon ≠ mapping of horizon_type → honest block). evaluate_registry_entries reloads bundle between specs (two specs compose into two distinct challengers). dry_run does not persist or mutate.
4 tests — CLI --dry-run runs full pipeline without persistence. CLI normal emits proposal + evaluation + governance_queue job. governance_scan tick without spec provider → honest skip. governance_scan tick with provider returning one spec → evaluator invoked exactly once, by_outcome={'proposal_emitted': 1}.

extended_tests.test_agentic_packets_v1.py: Existing suite covers ValidationPromotionEvaluationV1 via PACKET_TYPES + PACKET_TYPE_TO_CLASS (added in contracts).
extended_tests.test_agentic_layer5_orchestrator_v1.py: Two new tests — (1) _SYSTEM_PROMPT teaches ValidationPromotionEvaluationV1 / proposal_emitted / blocked_by_gate / blocking_reasons / pit_failed / harness-decide approve vocabulary. (2) state_reader_agent.why_changed surfaces ValidationPromotionEvaluationV1 as an asset-neutral governance-lineage signal.
extended_tests.test_agentic_scheduler_tick_v1.py: test_default_cadences_have_four_layers updated to assert 'layer4.governance_scan' is present.
One new test — api_governance_lineage_for_registry_entry surfaces validation_promotion_evaluations (flat list + per-chain field); blocked evaluations without proposals still appear in the flat list; summary.total_evaluations + summary.total_emitted_from_evaluator are accurate.

test_coverage.full_suite_green: 278 AGH v1 + replay_lineage + traceability tests pass. 1073/1074 repo tests pass (the one failure, test_phase39_orchestrator_writes_artifacts, is pre-existing and unrelated to Patch 4).

five_scenarios_captured.observed: evaluator added a new challenger slot (art_demo_factor_large_cap_research_slice_demo_v0_next_month_raw_47590c4f) to registry_entries[0].challenger_artifact_ids and appended the candidate artifact to bundle.artifacts[]; emitted ValidationPromotionEvaluationV1 (outcome=proposal_emitted) + RegistryUpdateProposalV1 (target=registry_entry_artifact_promotion) + governance_queue job; active_artifact_id=art_active_v0 UNCHANGED (apply still gated).

pit_certified=False in summary_json → verdict=reject, outcome=blocked_by_gate; bundle unchanged (0 challenger, 1 artifact); 0 proposals; 0 governance_queue jobs; evaluation packet blocking_reasons includes 'pit_failed' and the gate-adapter reason string.

summary fetch returned no rows → outcome=blocked_missing_evidence with explicit 'no_completed_factor_validation_summary:...' blocking reason; bundle unchanged; 0 proposals; 0 jobs; 1 evaluation packet still emitted so replay records the honest miss.

bundle seeded with active_artifact_id matching the deterministic derive_artifact_id output → artifact_action=already_active, outcome=blocked_same_as_active; active state untouched; validation_pointer refreshed on the existing active artifact (factor_validation_run:run_fvr_promote_1); 0 proposals; 0 jobs.

same promote-shaped input as scenario 1 but dry_run=True; verdict=promote + artifact_action=added_challenger + derived_artifact_id reported; dry_run_preview.would_emit_proposal=true; 0 packets persisted; 0 jobs; bundle unchanged on disk.

safety_gates_honored.no_direct_active_registry_mutation: The evaluator NEVER touches active_artifact_id. Every path either (a) adds a challenger + emits a proposal for operator approval, or (b) blocks and records the reason. Active-state changes still require harness-decide + registry_patch_executor.
safety_gates_honored.canonical_write_path: Bundle mutation only through validate_merged_bundle_dict + write_bundle_json_atomic. bundle integrity failures short-circuit to blocked_bundle_integrity without writing.
safety_gates_honored.no_llm_authored_registry_writes: promotion_evaluator_v1 is deterministic: artifact id from a pure hash, gate verdict from gate_record.pit_pass/coverage_pass/monotonicity_pass, proposal payload built from bundle state + evidence_refs. No LLM in the path.
safety_gates_honored.honest_non_promotion: Every blocked outcome (gate, missing evidence, horizon mismatch, same-as-active, bundle integrity) still emits a ValidationPromotionEvaluationV1 with explicit blocking_reasons so replay can cite the upstream reason.
safety_gates_honored.operator_gate_preserved: Both the cadence and the CLI emit proposals + governance_queue jobs only; apply continues to require harness-decide approve + a harness-tick of registry_apply_queue.
safety_gates_honored.no_new_registry_truth: Today still reads only bundle.registry_entries (active_artifact_id + challenger_artifact_ids + recent_governed_applies). No evaluator-owned surface field is introduced.
safety_gates_honored.no_active_registry_mutation_payload: ValidationPromotionEvaluationV1 validator rejects any payload carrying a raw active_registry_mutation key.

deferred_scope_for_future_patches.CF-1_live_supabase_evaluator_smoke: Unit tests + runbook drive the evaluator via fixture fetchers. An end-to-end live run against real factor_validation_summaries + factor_quantile_results rows (DEMO_KR + AAPL shape, parallel to Patch 1's live smoke) is deferred. Shape stays identical: _default_fetch_validation_summary / _default_fetch_quantiles rely on db.records helpers already wired for Supabase; the evaluator does not need a code change for live runs, only a populated client.
deferred_scope_for_future_patches.CF-2_governance_scan_spec_provider: The cadence ships with set_governance_scan_spec_provider(None) by default → honest skip. A production-grade provider that walks 'recent completed factor_validation_runs whose (factor, universe, horizon_type) matches a registered registry_entry' is deferred. The provider contract is already defined (Callable[[store, now_iso], list[spec dict]]), so plug-in happens without further contract changes.
deferred_scope_for_future_patches.batched_multi_basis_evaluation: Current evaluator handles one (factor, universe, horizon_type, return_basis) slot per call. Cross-basis + cross-universe batching (e.g. raw + excess in one evaluation packet) is out of scope.
deferred_scope_for_future_patches.evaluator_retry_semantics: bundle_write_failed currently short-circuits to blocked_bundle_integrity with retryable=False. A more nuanced retry taxonomy (retryable transient fs errors vs. fail-fast integrity errors) mirrors Patch 1's retry/backoff work and is deferred.

acceptance_matrix_work_order_alignment.§2_single_objective: Closed — deterministic upstream path from completed validation evidence to governed promotion proposal generation.
acceptance_matrix_work_order_alignment.§3_non_negotiables: All honored — no direct active-state mutation; no LLM-authored registry writes; automated proposal emission with operator-gated apply; canonical write path preserved; no alternative registry truth; Today reads only active registry state; honest non-promotion outputs when evidence is insufficient.
acceptance_matrix_work_order_alignment.§5_patch_plan_A_to_I: A (packet contract + migration), B (evaluator module with derive_artifact_id + evaluate_validation_for_promotion + evaluate_registry_entries + canonical bundle writes), C (harness-evaluate-promotions CLI), D (governance_scan cadence + runtime wiring), E (L5 state_reader + system prompt), F (replay lineage extension), G (tests), H (runbook + evidence), I (handoff) — all closed.
acceptance_matrix_work_order_alignment.§6_out_of_scope_respected: No direct active-state writes by the evaluator; no LLM-authored bundle mutations; no new registry truth; no backfill runbook (CF-1 deferred); no spec provider implementation (CF-2 deferred).
